message:
🐛 Fix EPG guide alignment, add channel sorting, improve rename (#40)

- Fix EPG guide: programme blocks now positioned absolutely relative to
  dayStart using Stack instead of Row, so they align correctly with the
  time ruler. Time ruler labels now generated from dayStart to dayEnd
  instead of hardcoded 0-23 hours.
- Fix auto-scroll to 'now': compute offset relative to dayStart instead
  of midnight.
- Sort channels alphabetically (case-insensitive) by default.
- Skip re-selecting already-selected channel to avoid reloading stream.
- Instant rename: update local channel lists immediately via copyWith
  instead of full _loadChannels reload.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
